details.attacks: 4 x attacks (1d4 by claw or weapon)
details.special: PSI: Kinetic Shield, Kinetic Leap, ESP WT: Chameleon Power, Send Thoughts Powers: 6 Rank: 1st Multi-arm: Thri-kreen have four arms and can use up to four weapons at once. They receive a penalty of -2 on their attack roll if they carry any extra weapon. 52 Tohr-kreen are larger, cultured versions of thri-kreen. They are more civilized than their smaller cousins, and not nearly as aggressive. Howeve

system.description:
Ssurrans are nomadic, humanoid lizard-folk who roam the desert wastes of Athas in large groups.
